column2: Case 5 — Two Assemblers + Arm + Two AMRs
Adds a second AMR to resolve the fetch/deliver conflict seen in Case 4. With two AMRs one can fetch while the other delivers simultaneously
column3: eliminating the stall caused by a single AMR trying to do both. Compare Full Cycle Time and Non-Value-Added Time directly against Case 4 to isolate the AMR bottleneck impact.
